data.title: Elon Musk’s xAI Sues OpenAI Over Alleged Tech Theft, Poaching Scheme
data.description:
Elon Musk’s AI firm, xAI, has filed a new lawsuit against OpenAI, accusing the ChatGPT creator of systematically poaching staff and stealing technology.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/elon-musks-xai-sues-openai-over-alleged-tech-theft-poaching-scheme/

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-09-26)

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $108,632 and $112,136 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $109,647, down by -2.16%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading lower. Market outperformers include XPL, SNX, and 1000SATS, up by 1168%, 16%, and 14%, respectively.

data.title: A smart money address spent 9.829 million USDT to buy 89.44 WBTC
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a smart money address (0xdfc...c07), which profited $5.16 million by shorting BTC during the LUNA/UST crash, spent 9.829 million USDT to buy 89.44 WBTC in the past half hour at an average price of $109,897. This address previously profited $13.293 million by bottom-fishing BTC and ETH.

data.title: Billionaire Investor Ray Dalio Says Markets Are a Zero-Sum Game, Details One of ‘The Safest Asset Classes You Can Find’
data.description:
Billionaire Ray Dalio believes risk-averse investors should look to one safe asset class when navigating the “zero-sum” markets. Dalio, who founded the asset management firm Bridgewater Associates, says Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) are an effective option for middle-class investors because they guarantee a real return.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/26/billionaire-investor-ray-dalio-says-markets-are-a-zero-sum-game-details-one-of-the-safest-asset-classes-you-can-find/

data.title: Cipher Mining Plans $1.1 Billion Convertible Notes Offering
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Cipher Mining has announced plans to raise $1.1 billion through the issuance of convertible senior notes due in 2031. This new offering represents an increase from the previously announced $800 million principal amount. The issuance and sale are scheduled to settle on September 30, 2025, subject to customary closing conditions. The notes will not bear interest, and the principal will not accumulate. Additionally, Cipher Mining will grant initial purchasers a 13-day option to buy an additional $200 million in notes.

data.title: UK Banks to Launch Tokenized Deposits in Response to Central Bank's Call
data.description:
According to PANews, several major UK lending institutions are advancing plans to introduce tokenized versions of customer deposits next year. This move comes in response to a call from the Bank of England's Governor, Andrew Bailey, who advocated prioritizing tokenization technology over stablecoins. The UK Finance Association revealed on Friday that banks such as HSBC, NatWest, and Lloyds have initiated pilot projects to facilitate payments using tokenized deposits through online marketplaces. The trial also involves Barclays, Nationwide Building Society, and Santander, and is expected to continue until mid-2026. Additionally, the pilot will explore the application of tokenized deposits in mortgage transfer processes and digital asset settlements.

Despite the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) anticipating the finalization of stablecoin regulatory rules by the end of 2026, the Bank of England has clarified that banks can conduct tokenized deposit experiments within the existing regulatory framework. Currently, several large banks are simultaneously exploring both tokenized deposits and stablecoins. In July, Citigroup's CEO remarked that the significance of tokenized deposits might surpass that of stablecoins.

data.title: Binance reveals FF token economics: initial circulation 23.4%, HODLer airdrop accounts for 1.5%
data.description: According to part of the FF token economics revealed in the Binance HODLer airdrop announcement: Total FF token supply: 10 billion Maximum supply: 10 billion HODLer airdrop rewards: 150,000,000 FF (1.50% of the maximum total token supply) An additional 150,000,000 FF will be used for marketing activities 6 months after listing Initial circulation on Binance: 2,340,000,000 FF (23.40% of the maximum token supply) As previously reported, on September 20, Falcon Finance released the FF token economics, with a total supply of 10 billion tokens, managed by an independent foundation, and distributed as follows: 35% to the ecosystem, 32.2% to the foundation, 20% to the core team and early contributors, 8.3% for community airdrops and Launchpad sales, and 4.5% to investors.

data.title: Breaking: Blackrock’s Bitcoin Buy Worth $77M, Expands ETF Reserves
data.description:
World’s largest asset manager Blackrock has expanded its Bitcoin holdings once again. On-chain data shows the firm added 703. 7 BTC, valued at roughly $77 million, through its IBIT Bitcoin ETF. This latest purchase underscores BlackRock’s steady accumulation strategy
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/26/breaking-blackrocks-bitcoin-buy-worth-77m-expands-etf-reserves/

data.title: Bitcoin Sentiment Drops as Fear & Greed Index Hits New Lows
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, Bitcoin's sentiment took a significant hit as the latest price dip led to fresh liquidations. The Crypto Fear & Greed Index, a measure of market sentiment, has plummeted to levels not seen since Bitcoin was valued at $83,000. This shift in sentiment has sparked discussions about whether a turning point for Bitcoin's price is imminent. Bitcoin's price, nearing new monthly lows below $109,000, has had an immediate impact on market sentiment. The Fear & Greed Index, which tends to lag behind market movements, dropped to 28/100 on Friday, marking its lowest point since April 11. This represents a 16-point decline in just one day. The last time the index fell below 30/100, Bitcoin was trading around $83,000, shortly after recovering from $75,000 lows. This historical context has led some analysts to suggest that a market reversal could be on the horizon, although confirmation is still pending. The Fear & Greed Index has experienced erratic movements throughout 2025. Earlier in the year, the index fell to just 10/100 due to macroeconomic uncertainties, particularly concerning U.S. trade tariffs. Despite the current bearish sentiment, some indicators suggest a potential price rebound. Research from Santiment, a market analysis platform, highlighted that social media users were already anticipating lower prices before the recent dip. Historically, such predictions have increased the likelihood of a price rebound, as higher predictions often imply lower future prices. Additionally, data indicates that large-volume traders have been increasing their exposure in recent days, suggesting a possible shift in market dynamics.

data.title: Binance will launch FF spot trading at 21:00 on September 29th.
data.description: Binance will launch Falcon Finance (FF) spot trading on September 29, 2025, at 9:00 PM (UTC), with trading available against USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY. Seed-based trading rules apply. FF deposits will open at 6:00 PM (UTC), September 26, 2025. FF will be listed and traded during the Binance Alpha event (date to be announced). However, after spot trading opens, FF will no longer be displayed on Binance Alpha.

data.title: Canada Fines KuCoin $14M for Anti-Money Laundering Failures
data.description:
Canada’s financial intelligence agency has fined the operator of KuCoin C$19. 6 million (US$14. 09 million), the largest anti-money laundering penalty.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/canada-fines-kucoin-14m-for-anti-money-laundering-failures/

data.title: Rising U.S. Treasury Yields Pose Challenges to AI Investment Boom
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Panmure Liberum strategist Joachim Klement has highlighted the significant investments being made by tech giants in artificial intelligence, which are contributing to the ongoing rise in U.S. stock markets. However, the increasing yields on long-term U.S. Treasury bonds are threatening the investment surge in infrastructure such as data centers. The challenge for AI investments lies in the substantial funding required, much of which depends on debt financing. Since 2023, long-term Treasury yields have risen significantly, with a recent slight decline, and are expected to continue increasing through 2026. This trend will elevate debt costs, rendering some investment projects unprofitable.

Data indicates that for every 1% increase in long-term Treasury yields, the growth rate of IT equipment investment may decrease by 0.6%, while software investment growth could decline by 0.4%. Although higher Treasury yields will not completely stifle growth, they will inevitably cause delays. Given that current valuations already reflect overly optimistic expectations, this could lead to downward revisions in earnings forecasts for large-scale enterprises and other growth stocks.

data.title: Trump signs executive order on TikTok, Ministry of Foreign Affairs responds
data.description: Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Guo Jiakun presided over a regular press conference. Guo Jiakun stated, "I want to reiterate that China's position on the TikTok issue is clear. The Chinese government respects the wishes of businesses and welcomes them to conduct commercial negotiations based on market rules and reach solutions that comply with Chinese laws and regulations and balance interests. We hope that the United States will provide an open, fair, and non-discriminatory business environment for Chinese companies to invest in the United States." (CCTV News)

data.title: Hypervault Finance experienced abnormal withdrawals worth approximately $3.6 million
data.description: According to PeckShieldAlert, Hypervault Finance experienced an unusual withdrawal of approximately $3.6 million. The funds were bridged from Hyperliquid to Ethereum, converted to ETH, and 752 ETH were deposited into Tornado Cash.
